chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.209 of 2016 Muhammad Raisuddin & another Versus Dr. Aftabuddin & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA 2630/16 Dated: 15.04.2024 Mr. Ishrat Zahid Alvi holds brief for Mr. Rehman Aziz Malik for appellants. Raja Muhammad Safeer for respondent No.1. -.-.- Mr. Ishrat Zahid Alvi submits that Mr. Rehman Aziz Malik on instructions of his clients and consequently passed on to him intends to withdraw this appeal along with pending applications, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn with no orders as to costs along with pending applications. Judge Judge
